news.t: 5 Emerging Market ETFs That Limit China Investments

holdings.infoBox: KEMX is an equity ETF with a total of 299 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.91%, Samsung Electronics at 7.93%, SK hynix at 6.23%, MediaTek at 2.74%, and Samsung Electro-Mechanics at 1.68%.

overview.description: The KraneShares MSCI Emerging Markets EX China Index ETF (KEMX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets ex China index. The fund tracks the investment results of an index focused on large-cap and mid-cap companies within emerging market countries, excluding China. KEMX was launched on Apr 12, 2019 and is issued by KraneShares.

data.title: 5 Emerging Market ETFs That Limit China Investments
data.text: Emerging market exchange-traded funds that limit exposure to China may be a better bet for investors as China's stocks get battered.
